metadata.title: The story of Dahāg

themes.label: Resurrection (ristāxēz)

links.basis: Shared Dahāg/resurrection theme and overlapping vocabulary around Dahāg, ristāxēz, and final restoration.

passagePairs.note: Compare DD 36.84 with WZ 24.3 for the role of Dahāg in resurrection/final events.
Compare DD 36.84 with WZ 32.4 for the same Dahāg/resurrection complex.

notes: Use status values such as draft, reviewed, or confirmed.
Use strength to control network edge thickness later: 1 = weak, 2 = medium, 3 = strong.
Add as many themes, confirmedPassages, and links as needed.
Keep textId values matching one of: dd, py, wz, nm.
